Built for Real Fans

Everything You Need

The ultimate live companion for the baseball fan who watches with their brain.

⚾
Live Pitch Predictions

Call the pitch before the windup — fastball inside, slider away, changeup low. Locked the moment the pitcher starts his delivery.

💰
Coins & Multipliers

Every correct call earns coins. String hits together to build multipliers. Zero real money — just escalating stakes on every at-bat.

🏆
Ranks & Leaderboards

See where you stack up globally and within your leagues. Track your accuracy across every game you've played.

👥
Create or Join Teams

Start your own squad with a custom code or join friends' leagues instantly. Local rivalries, family competitions — the diamond never felt this personal.

📡
Follow All 30 MLB Clubs

Follow your team — or every team. Get game alerts and prediction prompts whenever your teams take the field.

🚫
Zero Sportsbook. Ever.

No gambling. No cash stakes. No house edge. Pure baseball IQ — legal everywhere, free for anyone 13 and up.

Simple as 1-2-3-4

How It Works

From download to leaderboard domination in four steps.

1
Download Free

Grab GameWagerBaseball from the App Store. No account required to browse — sign up in seconds when ready to play.

2
Pick a Live Game

Browse Live, Upcoming, and Past games. Tap any live MLB matchup to enter the prediction arena instantly.

3
Call Your Pitch

Before every pitch, predict Strike, Ball, or HBP — then go deeper with at-bat results: Single, Double, HR, Out, and more.

4
Earn & Climb

Correct calls stack coins and build your multiplier. Watch your rank rise in global and team leaderboards in real time.

Free · iOS · No Gambling
